product_overview: LoopView is a real-time dashboard for watching the automated testing loop run live, including write, verify, and result stages. It also lets signed-in users manage sessions, analyze failures with AI, replay past runs, and export LOOP.md reports.
core_goals: Sign up or sign in with email and password to access private loop data
Start and manage a loop session for a project under test
Observe live loop iterations across Write, Verify, and Result panels
Inspect failed iterations and generate AI fix suggestions
Review past sessions through history and replay views
Export a LOOP.md report for a completed session
Save personal connection settings for reuse across sessions

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Introduce LoopView and provide entry points for authentication and the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the LoopView headline, phase cards, and demo timeline -> Select the start option -> Navigate to /auth
Navigate to / -> See the LoopView headline, phase cards, and demo timeline -> Select the dashboard link -> Navigate to /dashboard

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to create an account or sign in with email and password, then continue to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Switch to sign up mode -> Fill in name, email, and password -> Submit the form -> See the account created successfully -> Navigate to /dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Switch to sign in mode -> Fill in email and password -> Submit the form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Attempt to sign in with invalid credentials -> Submit the form -> See an inline error message

features.name: Loop Dashboard
features.description: Show the current loop session state, the three main panels, timeline, and stat tiles on the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See the Write, Verify, and Result panels -> See the loop timeline and stat tiles
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click a timeline block -> See that iteration displayed in the panels
Navigate to /dashboard -> Sign out or remain unauthenticated -> See a demo loop with a prompt to sign in

features.name: Loop Session Management
features.description: Let signed-in users start a session, simulate iterations, end the session, and begin a new one.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Fill in the app URL under test and optional project ID -> Start the session -> See the session become active
Navigate to /dashboard -> With an active session, simulate an iteration -> See a new iteration appear in the panels and timeline
Navigate to /dashboard -> With an active session, end the session -> See the session complete and become inactive
Navigate to /dashboard -> After ending a session, start a new session -> See a fresh session begin

features.name: AI Fix Assistant
features.description: Analyze a failed iteration and show a root cause with a suggested fix.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a failed iteration -> Analyze the failure -> See the AI root cause, file and line, and fix snippet
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a failed iteration -> Analyze the failure -> Copy the suggested fix

features.name: Loop History and LOOP.md Export
features.description: Allow users to review past sessions, open replays, and generate a LOOP.md report.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> See past sessions with app URL, pass rate, loop count, and status
Navigate to /history -> Select a session -> Open its replay page
Navigate to /history -> Generate LOOP.md -> See the report in a modal -> Copy the report
Navigate to /history -> Generate LOOP.md -> See the report in a modal -> Download the report

features.name: Session Replay
features.description: Replay a past session iteration by iteration using playback controls and a scrubber.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Click replay -> Step through iterations one by one
Navigate to /session/[id] -> Drag the scrubber -> Jump to a specific iteration

features.name: Connection Settings
features.description: Save and persist the user's TestSprite API key, project ID, and app URL.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Fill in the TestSprite API key, project ID, and app URL -> Save the settings -> See a success confirmation and retained values after reload

tech_stack: InsForge Model Gateway (OpenRouter / Claude Sonnet) via OpenAI SDK

routes.description: Landing page with hero, three loop-phase cards, and a demo timeline
Sign in / sign up (email + password) with optional email verification
Loop dashboard; demo data when signed out, live realtime session when signed in
List of past loop sessions and a Generate LOOP.md export
Replay a past session with playback controls and a scrubber
Save TestSprite API key, Project ID, and app URL under test

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Register and sign in with email and password; redirect to dashboard on success
user_interactions: Toggle between Sign in and Sign up
Fill name (sign up), email, and password fields
Click submit to sign in or create account
See an inline error message on invalid credentials
Enter a 6-digit code if email verification is enabled

features.name: Loop Dashboard
features.description: Three-panel Write/Verify/Result view plus a clickable loop timeline and stat tiles
user_interactions: View Write, Verify, and Result panels for the current iteration
Click a timeline block to inspect that iteration
See stat tiles for total loops, passed, pass rate, and elapsed time

features.name: Loop Session Management
features.description: Start a loop session, add iterations, and end the session
user_interactions: Fill App URL under test and optional Project ID
Click Start session
Click Simulate iteration to add a new loop iteration
Click End to complete the session
Click New session to start over

features.name: AI Fix Assistant
features.description: Analyze a failed iteration and return a root cause and fix suggestion
user_interactions: Select a failed iteration
Click Analyze failure
View the AI root cause, file/line, and fix snippet
Click Copy fix

features.name: Loop History and LOOP.md Export
features.description: List past sessions and generate a downloadable LOOP.md report
user_interactions: View past sessions with app URL, pass rate, and status
Click a session to open its replay
Click Generate LOOP.md
Copy or Download the generated report

features.name: Session Replay
features.description: Replay a past session iteration-by-iteration with a scrubber
user_interactions: Click Replay to step through iterations
Drag the scrubber to jump to any iteration

features.name: Connection Settings
features.description: Persist per-user TestSprite key, Project ID, and app URL
user_interactions: Fill TestSprite API key, Project ID, and App URL
Click Save settings
See a success confirmation; values persist across reload

known_limitations.issue: Simulate iteration inserts scripted demo iterations, not real TestSprite runs
known_limitations.impact: Used to demonstrate the realtime pipeline before the real runner is wired

known_limitations.issue: Failure bundle screenshot is a placeholder slot
known_limitations.impact: Screenshot area shows a placeholder until real artifacts are stored
